Bus Timings

Bus 201 Schedule Shuhadah Badar Mosque to Abu Dhabi Bus Station

October 5, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Abu Dhabi Reg Bus 201 is a crucial part of the city’s public transport system, connecting Al Bahyah with Abu Dhabi Bus Station in the Al Nahyan area. This bus route serves both residents and visitors, providing a reliable and affordable means of transport across key areas of the city.

Operational Details

Bus 201 operates with a consistent schedule throughout the day, ensuring convenient access for passengers:

From Shuhadah Badar Mosque From Abu Dhabi Bus Station
06:32 09:03
07:02 09:33
07:32 10:03
08:02 11:03
08:32 12:01
09:02 13:01
10:02 14:01
11:00 15:01
12:00 16:01
13:00 17:01
14:00 17:31
15:00 18:01
16:00 18:31
16:30 19:01
17:00 19:31
17:30 20:01
18:00 21:01
18:30 22:01
19:00 23:01
20:00 00:01
21:00  
22:00  
23:00  

Download PDF Bus 201

Bus 201 Timetable

For the full schedule, you can refer to the official AD Mobility website, or you can follow this link 201 Bus Timings.

Ticket Pricing:

  • Standard Fare: AED 2.00, with an additional AED 0.05 per kilometer.

  • Payment Methods: Passengers can use the Hafilat Smart Card for easy fare payment, which can be topped up at various points throughout Abu Dhabi. For more details on fares and top-up locations, visit the official website of the Abu Dhabi Department of Transport.

Route Overview

  1. Shuhadah Badar Mosque The starting point, located in Al Bahyah.

  2. Halima Al Sa’adeya School A key stop for students and educational facilities.

  3. ADIB Serves passengers visiting the Abu Dhabi Islamic Bank.

  4. Al Shahama Bus Station A major transit point connecting to other routes.

  5. Green Mart Market A convenient stop for shoppers.

  6. Eid Prayer Ground A community spot for religious gatherings.

  7. Shahma Municipality Serving the local administrative area.

  8. F1 Assembly Point A key stop along Al Widayhi Street.

  9. Deerfields Mall A major shopping destination.

  10. ADNOC One of Abu Dhabi’s leading energy companies.

  11. Al Khawarizmi International College An important educational institution.

  12. Al Bahya Park A green escape for recreation and relaxation.

  13. Al Naham Street A central residential and commercial area.

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. Souq A bustling local market area.

  2. Hazaa Bin Zayed Mosque A prominent religious landmark.

  3. Emirates Tower A well-known office and business area.

  4. Fatimah Bint Mubarak Street A busy commercial street.

  5. Madinat Zayed Shopping Centre A popular retail hub in Abu Dhabi.

  6. Mariam Bint Said Mosque A peaceful stop near the mosque.

  7. Abu Dhabi Bus Station The final stop, connecting to multiple bus routes for further travel.

Some other Abu Dhabi bus routes you can check out include the 202 bus route, which runs from Al Rahba Hospital to Abu Dhabi Bus Station, and the 300 route, which goes from Capital Park to Al Shamkha Makani Mall.

Accessibility Features

The buses feature ramps for easy boarding, dedicated seating for passengers with special needs, and audio-visual aids to assist those with hearing or vision impairments. These features make the bus route accessible and convenient for everyone.

Connectivity and Transfer Points

Reg Bus 201 connects seamlessly with other bus routes at Al Shahama Bus Station and Abu Dhabi Bus Station, providing easy transfer options for those looking to explore more of the city. Whether you’re heading to a mall, mosque, or residential area, Bus 201 ensures smooth transitions between key parts of Abu Dhabi.

Nearby Attractions

  • Deerfields Mall

  • Madinat Zayed Shopping Centre
  • Hazaa Bin Zayed Mosque

Journey Experience

As the route weaves through Abu Dhabi, passengers get to experience a mix of serene neighborhoods and bustling commercial districts.

Travel Tips

To avoid crowded buses, try traveling during off-peak hours. It’s also a good idea to check the Abu Dhabi Department of Transport app for real-time updates on bus schedules and any potential delays. Be sure to keep your Hafilat Smart Card topped up to ensure you’re ready to board, and always stay mindful of your belongings during the journey.

Abu Dhabi Reg Bus 201 is a reliable and efficient transport option, offering comprehensive connectivity across the city.

Whether you’re heading to work, running errands, or exploring Abu Dhabi, Bus 201 is a convenient, eco-friendly choice for getting around the city. For more detailed information on schedules and routes, be sure to check the Abu Dhabi Department of Transport’s official resources, or explore the full Abu Dhabi bus routes for a complete overview.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: October 5, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej
